languages.text: Губернатор Янур Батошски правил Зарковым совсем недолго. Хозяйственный, но совершенно неамбициозный, он встретил предсказуемый конец, став жертвой чужих амбиций и интриг.
Governor Janur Batoshski ruled Zarkov for a very short time. Practical but completely lacking vision, he met a predictable end, falling victim to other people's ambitions and intrigues.
languages.original_text: Губернатор Янур Батошски правил Зарковым совсем недолго. Хозяйственный, но совершенно неамбициозный, он встретил предсказуемый конец, став жертвой чужих амбиций и интриг.

traits.locale_text: Governor Janur Batoshski ruled Zarkov for a very short time. Practical but completely lacking vision, he met a predictable end, falling victim to other people's ambitions and intrigues.
Governor Janur Batoshski ruled Zarkov for a very short time. Practical but completely lacking vision, he met a predictable end, falling victim to other people's ambitions and intrigues.
Governor Janur Batoshski ruled Zarkov for a very short time. Practical but completely lacking vision, he met a predictable end, falling victim to other people's ambitions and intrigues.

languages.text: ジャンヌル・バトシュスキーはザルコフを統治したものの、その期間は非常に短かった。現実的だが全くビジョンを持たない彼は、他者の野望や陰謀に巻き込まれ、予期せぬ結末を迎える。
languages.original_text: Governor Janur Batoshski ruled Zarkov for a very short time. Practical but completely lacking vision, he met a predictable end, falling victim to other people's ambitions and intrigues.

traits.locale_text: ジャンヌル・バトシュスキーはザルコフを統治したものの、その期間は非常に短かった。現実的だが全くビジョンを持たない彼は、他者の野望や陰謀に巻き込まれ、予期せぬ結末を迎える。

languages.text: 总督雅努尔·巴托什斯基统治扎尔科夫的时间很短。他务实，却毫无远见，最后成了他人野心与阴谋的牺牲品，迎来了意料之中的结局。
languages.original_text: Governor Janur Batoshski ruled Zarkov for a very short time. Practical but completely lacking vision, he met a predictable end, falling victim to other people's ambitions and intrigues.

traits.locale_text: 总督雅努尔·巴托什斯基统治扎尔科夫的时间很短。他务实，却毫无远见，最后成了他人野心与阴谋的牺牲品，迎来了意料之中的结局。

languages.text: Le gouverneur Janur Batoshski ne dirigea Zarkov que pendant très peu de temps. C'était un homme pragmatique, mais son absence totale de clairvoyance lui valut une mort prévisible, victime des ambitions et des intrigues de ses opposants.
languages.original_text: Governor Janur Batoshski ruled Zarkov for a very short time. Practical but completely lacking vision, he met a predictable end, falling victim to other people's ambitions and intrigues.

traits.locale_text: Le gouverneur Janur Batoshski ne dirigea Zarkov que pendant très peu de temps. C'était un homme pragmatique, mais son absence totale de clairvoyance lui valut une mort prévisible, victime des ambitions et des intrigues de ses opposants.

languages.text: El gobernador Janur Batoshski pasó muy poco tiempo al mando de Zarkov. Era práctico, pero carecía por completo de visión y sufrió un final predecible: víctima de las ambiciones e intrigas de otras personas.
languages.original_text: Governor Janur Batoshski ruled Zarkov for a very short time. Practical but completely lacking vision, he met a predictable end, falling victim to other people's ambitions and intrigues.

traits.locale_text: El gobernador Janur Batoshski pasó muy poco tiempo al mando de Zarkov. Era práctico, pero carecía por completo de visión y sufrió un final predecible: víctima de las ambiciones e intrigas de otras personas.

languages.text: Vali Janur Batoshski, Zarkov'u çok kısa bir süreliğine yönetti. Pratik ancak vizyondan tamamen yoksun biri olarak diğer insanların hırslarına ve entrikalarına kurban gidip öngörülebilir bir son yaşadı.
languages.original_text: Governor Janur Batoshski ruled Zarkov for a very short time. Practical but completely lacking vision, he met a predictable end, falling victim to other people's ambitions and intrigues.

traits.locale_text: Vali Janur Batoshski, Zarkov'u çok kısa bir süreliğine yönetti. Pratik ancak vizyondan tamamen yoksun biri olarak diğer insanların hırslarına ve entrikalarına kurban gidip öngörülebilir bir son yaşadı.

languages.text: Gouverneur Janur Batoshski herrschte nur sehr kurz über Zarkov. Als Pragmatiker ohne jede Vision nahm er ein vorhersehbares Ende und wurde das Opfer der Ambitionen und Intrigen anderer Leute.
languages.original_text: Governor Janur Batoshski ruled Zarkov for a very short time. Practical but completely lacking vision, he met a predictable end, falling victim to other people's ambitions and intrigues.
